articles.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
articles.description: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.

articles.title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
articles.description: Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.

articles.title: Meta is paying creators in Stablecoins. Spending them is someone else's problem
articles.description: Meta’s decision to pay creators in USDC validates stablecoins as a mainstream disbursement tool, Joslyn suggests, but it also exposes the industry’s unresolved problem: moving seamlessly from digital dollars to usable local currency.

articles.title: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
articles.description: President Donald Trump said he's discussing deals "where the American people can benefit from the success of AI."

articles.title: Bitcoin most oversold since 2020 crash: Can BTC rebound to $70K next?
articles.description: Bitcoin’s latest oversold RSI mirrors 2020 and February 2026 setups that preceded 50% and 30% rebounds, putting $70K back in focus.

articles.title: America’s largest banks are building a new digital currency network to stop a massive deposit drain
articles.description: America’s biggest banks are launching tokenized deposits to compete with stablecoins, opening a new front in the race to become the dominant form of cash on blockchain networks.

articles.title: A crypto pioneer who turned a $20 million family stake into a billion-dollar fund doubles down on bitcoin
articles.description: Sourcing initial capital from his mother to build a $1 billion crypto empire, DFG CEO James Wo says market metrics do not support Tom Lee’s $250,000 ether prediction.

articles.title: Satoshi-era bitcoin at center of $285 billion lawsuit moves after 14 years
articles.description: The 1LwWt address received a legal notice from Salomon Brothers via Bitcoin's OP_RETURN field in July 2025 demanding the owner prove ownership by November 5, 2025.

articles.title: A massive hiring wave reveals trading firms are no longer viewing Polymarket as a niche betting tool
articles.description: While rising volume on Polymarket and Kalshi is attracting quantitative firms to prediction markets, they aren't focusing on event outcomes; rather, they're exploiting market inefficiencies for profit.

articles.title: Michael Saylor’s rallying cry: Bitcoin needs four forces to win
articles.description: The Strategy executive chairman argued that four distinct camps each play a vital role in bitcoin’s long-term success.

articles.title: Are retail traders selling their bitcoin to buy the SpaceX IPO?
articles.description: Exchange flows and stablecoin movements through this week's sell-off show no wall of money leaving crypto for cash. Exchanges such as Robinhood and Coinbase will not publicly reporting their figures until July.

articles.title: Researcher who found Zcash's bug with AI adds Monero to his audit queue
articles.description: Taylor Hornby, who uncovered the Orchard flaw that sent Zcash down 38%, says other privacy coins are on his list too.

articles.title: WLD plunges 20% as Hayes dumps token a day after saying he would keep holding it
articles.description: The BitMEX co-founder and Maelstrom CIO cited a falling chart of SpaceX stock, which does not begin trading until June 12, as Worldcoin slid about 10%.

articles.title: Bitcoin back above $61,000 after rout leads to $1.6 billion liquidations
articles.description: Bitcoin fell as low as $59,227 overnight before recovering, steadying after Friday's strong jobs report set off a selloff that sank the Nasdaq 100 about 5% and rattled stocks, bonds and crypto together.
